InterGlobe Aviation Limited (“IndiGo”) to Announce First Quarter 2021 Results on July 29, 2020 
Gurgaon, July 22, 2020: IndiGo will be announcing its First Quarter 2021 results on July 29, 2020. 
The company will conduct a 60 minutes conference call at 17:00 hours IST on July 29, 2020 (open 
to investors/ analysts in all regions), where senior management will discuss the company’s
qa_section:
performance and answer questions from participants. To participate in the conference call, please 
dial the numbers provided below. 
Results will be available around 16:00 hours on Wednesday, July 29, 2020 at the company’s 
website (www.goindigo.in) or on the exchange website (www.nseindia.com/ www.bseindia.com). 
The call will also be recorded and will be archived at www.goindigo.in. In addition, a transcript of 
the conference call will be available on www.goindigo.in 
Date and Time 
July 29, 2020 at: 
17:00 hours IST 
19:30 hours HKT 
11:30 hours UTC 
07:30 hours ET

call

InterGlobe Aviation Limited (“IndiGo”) to Announce First Quarter 2021 Results on July 29, 2020 
Gurgaon, July 22, 2020: IndiGo will be announcing its First Quarter 2021 results on July 29, 2020. 
The company will conduct a 60 minutes conference call at 17:00 hours IST on July 29, 2020 (open 
to investors/ analysts in all regions), where senior management will discuss the company’s 
performance and answer questions from participants. To participate in the conference call, please
